question: 2026년 3월 14일 캠페인별 CTR을 내림차순으로 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY ctr DESC

question: 어제(2026-03-13) 모바일 기기의 총 impression 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='13' AND device_type='mobile'

question: 2026년 3월 14일 전환이 발생한 광고 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ad_id) AS converted_ads FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true

question: 2026년 3월 14일 캠페인별 CVR(전환율) 상위 5개
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cvr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY cvr DESC LIMIT 5

question: 2026년 3월 14일 광고주별 총 광고비
ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(cost_per_impression) AS total_cost FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 클릭당 비용(CPC)이 가장 낮은 캠페인 TOP 5
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, SUM(cost_per_click) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cpc FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY cpc ASC LIMIT 5

question: 2026년 3월 14일 지역별 impression 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT delivery_region, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY delivery_region ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 디바이스 타입별 클릭 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT device_type, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY clicks DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 총 전환 매출
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true

question: 2026년 3월 14일 09시 시간대 impression 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND hour='09'

question: 2026년 3월 14일 플랫폼별 CTR
ground_truth_sql: SELECT platform, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY platform ORDER BY ctr DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 전환 타입별 건수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT conversion_type, COUNT(*) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY conversion_type ORDER BY conversions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 광고 형식별 impression 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_format, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY ad_format ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 캠페인별 ROAS(광고비 대비 매출)
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, SUM(conversion_value) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression), 0) AS roas FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY roas DESC

question: 2026년 3월 한 달 전체 캠페인별 총 impression
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) AS total_impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY total_impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 서울 지역 클릭 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND delivery_region='서울'

question: 2026년 3월 14일 iOS 앱 플랫폼 impression 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND platform='app_ios'

question: 2026년 3월 14일 구매(purchase) 전환 총 매출
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true AND conversion_type='purchase'

question: 2026년 3월 14일 시간대별 클릭 수 추이
ground_truth_sql: SELECT hour, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

question: 2026년 3월 14일 광고주별 CPA(전환당 비용)
ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(cost_per_impression) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cpa FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY cpa ASC
